hero.headline: Designing Clarity in a Complex World
hero.subheadline: We transform complex challenges into elegant, intuitive design solutions that empower businesses and users.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Minimalist abstract composition with geometric shapes in muted blues, grays, and whites. Clean lines, soft shadows, representing design simplicity and clarity.

about.title: About Forma Studio - Our Story and Values

agency_story.mission: At Forma Studio, we believe design is more than aesthetics—it's a powerful tool for solving complex problems and creating meaningful experiences.

team.name: Elena Rodriguez
team.bio: With 12 years of experience in digital design, Elena leads our creative vision, ensuring every project balances artistic expression with strategic thinking.

team.name: Marcus Chen
team.bio: A human-centered design expert, Marcus translates user insights into intuitive interfaces that feel both innovative and familiar.

team.name: Aria Thompson
team.bio: Bridging design and technology, Aria brings technical precision and creative problem-solving to every project we undertake.

agency_story.hero_image_prompt: Modern design studio interior with minimalist furniture, large windows, designers collaborating around a light table. Soft natural light, neutral color palette.

work.title: Forma Studio - Our Design Projects

projects.title: Lumina Brand Identity
projects.description: A comprehensive branding system for a sustainable tech startup, creating a visual language that communicates innovation and environmental responsibility.

projects.title: Pulse Healthcare App
projects.description: A user-centered mobile application that simplifies patient-doctor communication and medical record management.

projects.title: Verdant Coworking Website
projects.description: An immersive web experience that captures the energy and community of a modern, eco-friendly workspace.

projects.title: Kinetic Fitness Wearable
projects.description: A sleek, intuitive fitness tracker that seamlessly integrates advanced technology with elegant, minimalist design.

projects.title: Horizon Financial Dashboard
projects.description: A complex financial data visualization platform transformed into an intuitive, user-friendly interface.

projects.title: Bloom Organic Packaging
projects.description: Sustainable packaging design that tells a story of natural ingredients, ethical sourcing, and environmental consciousness.

work.hero_image_prompt: A dynamic collage of design project snippets: logo sketches, app interfaces, product mockups. Overlapping layers, muted color palette, clean design aesthetic.

contact.title: Contact Forma Studio - Let's Create Together

contact_info.welcome_message: Ready to transform your vision into an extraordinary design solution? We're excited to hear about your project.

contact.hero_image_prompt: Minimalist contact scene with design tools: sketchbook, digital tablet, color swatches. Soft, diffused lighting, neutral background, suggesting creativity and collaboration.
